title: Adamantium Mod
description:
Adamantium Mod

Adds Adamantium metal ores to the world along with all recipes for ingots, blocks, etc. pertaining to the new metal ore. Users will be able to craft the Adamantium claws to use as both a strong weapon and diamond-grade mining tool!
body:
# Adamantium Mod
Adds Adamantium ores to the world! Mine for Adamantium and create the powerful Adamantium claws weapon/mining tool!

## Environment
Runs on the logical server side since it contains world-gen modifications

## Mine for ores!
![Adamantium Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ecf44ab353fae58afa594fd92137ffd3087840.png)
Mine the world for adamantium ores!

## Craft the claws!
![Craft the claws!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecc36def8105fbd87cb147f9695f351f997adbb8.png)
Collect adamantium ores and smelt raw adamantium into ingots. Combine these with a few diamonds for a powerful claw weapon/mining tool!

## Real Textures Add-on
Visit [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/adamantium-real-addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/adamantium-real-addon) to download the resource pack and add realistic textures (fits with Patrix mods) to the new ores, items, and claws contained in this mod.
